prompts.global_style: chibi RPG character art, cute chibi proportions with big head and short body, vibrant full color illustration, detailed fantasy armor and clothing, bold clean outlines, rich saturated colors, front-facing full body portrait, large figure centered filling the frame, plain neutral background, mobile game character art style, high quality digital illustration
prompts.negative: pixel art, 3D render, realistic photo, blurry, watermark, text, logo, multiple characters, sprite sheet, background scene, environment, tiny figure, cropped, sketch, rough lines, low quality

poses.idle: neutral idle pose, weight balanced, readable silhouette
poses.walk_south_0: walking toward viewer, left foot forward, 2.5D three-quarter angle view from slightly above, character facing down-toward-viewer in isometric perspective
poses.walk_south_1: walking toward viewer, both feet centered passing pose, 2.5D three-quarter angle view from slightly above
poses.walk_south_2: walking toward viewer, right foot forward, 2.5D three-quarter angle view from slightly above
poses.walk_south_3: walking toward viewer, both feet centered passing pose alternate, 2.5D three-quarter angle view from slightly above
poses.walk_north_0: walking away from viewer, left foot forward, 2.5D three-quarter angle view from slightly above, character facing up-away in isometric perspective
poses.walk_north_1: walking away from viewer, both feet centered passing pose, 2.5D three-quarter angle view from slightly above
poses.walk_north_2: walking away from viewer, right foot forward, 2.5D three-quarter angle view from slightly above
poses.walk_north_3: walking away from viewer, both feet centered passing pose alternate, 2.5D three-quarter angle view from slightly above
poses.walk_east_0: walking right, left foot forward, 2.5D side-facing three-quarter angle, character profile facing right
poses.walk_east_1: walking right, both feet centered passing pose, 2.5D side-facing three-quarter angle
poses.walk_east_2: walking right, right foot forward, 2.5D side-facing three-quarter angle
poses.walk_east_3: walking right, both feet centered passing pose alternate, 2.5D side-facing three-quarter angle
poses.walk_west_0: walking left, left foot forward, 2.5D side-facing three-quarter angle, character profile facing left
poses.walk_west_1: walking left, both feet centered passing pose, 2.5D side-facing three-quarter angle
poses.walk_west_2: walking left, right foot forward, 2.5D side-facing three-quarter angle
poses.walk_west_3: walking left, both feet centered passing pose alternate, 2.5D side-facing three-quarter angle
poses.walk_contact: walk cycle contact pose, one foot forward, one back
poses.walk_passing: walk cycle passing pose, hips centered
poses.attack_impact: attack impact pose, clear forward action line
